segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Hello?
segments.zh: 喂？

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Oh, hello.
segments.zh: 哦，你好。请问是朱莉·戴维森吗？

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Is that Julie Davison?

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 是的。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: This is Greg Preston from the Employment Agency.
segments.zh: 我是职业介绍所的格雷格·普雷斯顿。上周你来咨询办公室工作的时候我们见过面。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: We met last week when you came in to enquire about office work.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Oh, that's right.
segments.zh: 哦，对。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Now we've just had some details come in of a job which might interest you.
segments.zh: 现在我们刚收到一份工作的详细信息，你可能会感兴趣。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: So this is a position for a receptionist – I believe you've done that sort of work before?
segments.zh: 这是一个前台接待员的职位——我记得你以前做过类似的工作？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Yes, I have, I worked in a sports centre for a couple of years before I got married and had the children.
segments.zh: 是的，我在结婚生孩子之前，在一个体育中心工作过几年。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。嗯，这份工作在福德姆，离你不算太远，是在那里的医疗中心。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Well, this job's in Fordham, so not too far away for you, and it's at the medical centre there.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。具体在哪儿呢？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: So where exactly is that?

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: It's quite near the station, on Chastons Road.
segments.zh: 离车站很近，在查斯顿路。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Sorry?
segments.zh: 不好意思，您说什么？

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Chastons Road – that's C-H-A-S-T-O-N-S.
segments.zh: 查斯顿路——拼写是C-H-A-S-T-O-N-S。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: OK, thanks.
segments.zh: 好的，谢谢。那工作内容是什么？处理病人的咨询吗？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: So what would the work involve?

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Dealing with enquiries from patients?

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Yes, and you'd also be involved in making appointments, whether face to face or on the phone.
segments.zh: 是的，你还要负责预约，无论是面对面还是电话预约，必要时还要重新安排时间。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: And rescheduling them if necessary.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Fine, that shouldn't be a problem.
segments.zh: 好的，那应该没问题。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: And another of your duties would be keeping the centre's database up-to-date.
segments.zh: 你的另一项职责是保持中心数据库的更新。此外可能还有其他一般的行政工作，但主要是这些。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Then you might have other general administrative duties as well, but those would be the main ones.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Now when the details came in, I immediately thought of you because one thing they do require is someone with experience, and you did mention your work at the sports centre when you came in to see us.
segments.zh: 当详细信息传过来时，我立刻想到了你，因为他们要求有经验的人，而你上次来见我们时提到过你在体育中心的工作。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Yes, in fact I enjoyed that job.
segments.zh: 是的，其实我很喜欢那份工作。他们还有其他要求吗？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Is there anything else they're looking for?

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Well, they say it's quite a high-pressure environment, they're always very busy, and patients are often under stress, so they want someone who can cope with that and stay calm, and at the same time be confident when interacting with the public.
segments.zh: 嗯，他们说工作环境压力很大，总是很忙，病人也常常处于紧张状态，所以他们需要能应对压力、保持冷静，同时与公众互动时自信的人。

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Well, after dealing with three children all under five, I reckon I can cope with that.
segments.zh: 嗯，照顾过三个五岁以下的孩子后，我觉得我能应付得来。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: I'm sure you can.
segments.zh: 我相信你可以。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: And then another thing they mention is that they're looking for someone with good IT skills ...
segments.zh: 另外他们还提到，希望找一个IT技能好的人……

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Not a problem.
segments.zh: 没问题。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: So you'd be interested in following this up?
segments.zh: 那你对这个感兴趣吗？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Sure.
segments.zh: 当然。什么时候开始？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: When would it start?

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Well, they're looking for someone from the beginning of next month, but I should tell you that this isn't a permanent job, it's temporary, so the contract would be just to the end of September.
segments.zh: 嗯，他们希望下个月初就有人到岗，但我得告诉你这不是长期职位，是临时的，合同只到九月底。不过他们确实说之后可能会有更多机会。

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: But they do say that there could be further opportunities after that.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。工作时间是怎样的？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: And what would the hours be?

pairs.note: 题干'Role'对应原文'position'，都是指'职位'，属于同义替换。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问'Role'（角色/职位），定位句提到'position for a receptionist'，其中'position'与'Role'同义，因此答案就是'receptionist'。

pairs.note: 地点名称完全一致，直接定位
题干问地点，原文用'at the medical centre'说明位置

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求填写地点，原文提到'it's at the medical centre there'，其中'medical'就是答案。

pairs.note: 原文直接出现'Road'，与题干相同。
题干中的'Fordham'是地名，但原文中道路名称是'Chastons Road'，说明'Chastons'是道路名的一部分，需要替换'Fordham'。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'Chastons Road'，其中'Chastons'是道路名，对应题干中空缺的'Fordham'，因此答案应为'Chastons'。

pairs.note: 原文直接出现making，与题干一致
reorganising（重新安排）与rescheduling（重新安排时间）同义

paraphrase.explain: 题干中making和reorganising分别对应原文的making和rescheduling，其中reorganising与rescheduling为同义替换，帮助定位到答案appointments。

pairs.note: maintaining 和 keeping 都表示'保持、维护'，是同义替换。
internal 指内部的，原文 centre's 表示'中心的'，属于同义改写。
database 是原词重现，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的 maintaining 对应原文 keeping，internal 对应 centre's，database 原词出现，因此定位到 'keeping the centre's database up-to-date'。

pairs.note: essential 和 require 都表示‘必要’，但 require 是动词，essential 是形容词。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句中的 'require' 与题干中的 'essential' 同义，且 'experience' 是答案词。

pairs.note: 原文直接出现 calm，与题干一致。
原文直接出现 confident，与答案一致。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的 calm 和 confident 在原文中直接出现，且顺序一致，因此定位到原文中 'stay calm, and at the same time be confident' 即可找到答案。

items.prompt: a 8 ________ job – further opportunities may be available

pairs.q: job – further opportunities may be available
pairs.p: temporary, so the contract would be just to the end of September. But they do say that there could be further opportunities after that
pairs.note: 题干说‘可能有更多机会’，原文说‘合同只到9月底，但之后可能有更多机会’，用‘temporary’对应‘不是永久工作’，‘further opportunities’直接复现。
原文‘isn't a permanent job’与题干‘not permanent’完全对应，帮助定位。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句开头说‘不是永久工作’，后面直接说‘是临时的’，并提到‘之后可能有更多机会’，与题干‘临时工作 – 可能有更多机会’完全匹配。

items.prompt: hours: 7.45 a.m. to 9 ________ p.m. Monday to Friday
